name: Peanut Butter Eggs
recipeIngredient: 4 tablespoons Honey (you can use 2 to 4 tablespoons)
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix well together.
2. Chill mixture and shape into egg form, or place in peanut butter cup molds or on parchment paper.
3. Dip the shaped chocolate into melted chocolate coating.
4. Place in freezer for a few minutes until set. Enjoy!
